news.t: Pacer ETFs and Barings Launch Two Actively Managed Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The Pacer Barings Secured Credit Flex ETF (PBSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund provides exposure to the global fixed income market, focusing on high-yield rated, collateral-secured debt of any maturity. PBSC was launched on Jun 22, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs and Barings Launch Two Actively Managed Fixed Income ETFs
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs and Barings introduce two active fixed income ETFs, expanding access to CLO and secured credit strategies.
